resources.string: Please choose a valid phone number
Use the back button to exit the map
This contact has no valid phone numbers !
Add contacts by clicking on the \'+\' button
An error occurred while trying to delete %1$s
Deleting this contact from \'SMS Finder\' will delete all of its info. You can always add them back !

Xiaomi phone detected!\n For this app to work properly you must allow it to execute in the background.\n To do this, go to the \"Security\" app, then to the \"Manage apps\" tab, then to the \"Automatic startup\" one and check \"SMS Finder\"
If geolocating this device should be allowed

Hi !


This was a simple app made for myself because I managed to lose my phone multiple times, and I don't always have the cellular network thingy on. If you are like this or straight up don't want to use any Google services, this is for you !


This app needs to be installed on another phone, or it will become useless.

Once configured, you select a password (aka a private key), add new contacts and from there you can send actions to other phones via SMS.\n For it to actually work, you need to add YOUR contact on the other phone and from there, actions will get sent through if enabled.
To correctly use this app this permission MUST be granted. You cannot continue if it isn\'t.
An image representing the logo of the %1$s permission
There are multiple permissions you need to grant to this app:
